creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Can you share your configuration for snmpd? With default example config, I cannot even do snmpget for ipForwarding:

# snmpget -v1 -c public localhost IP-MIB::ipForwarding.0
Did not find 'InetPortNumber' in module INET-ADDRESS-MIB (/usr/local/share/snmp/mibs/TCP-MIB.txt)
Did not find 'InetPortNumber' in module INET-ADDRESS-MIB (/usr/local/share/snmp/mibs/UDP-MIB.txt)
Did not find 'InetPortNumber' in module INET-ADDRESS-MIB (/usr/local/share/snmp/mibs/SCTP-MIB.txt)
Did not find 'InetAddressPrefixLength' in module INET-ADDRESS-MIB (/usr/local/share/snmp/mibs/IP-FORWARD-MIB.txt)
Did not find 'InetAutonomousSystemNumber' in module INET-ADDRESS-MIB (/usr/local/share/snmp/mibs/IP-FORWARD-MIB.txt)
Error in packet
Reason: (noSuchName) There is no such variable name in this MIB.
Failed object: IP-MIB::ipForwarding.0
